name: Martha's Vineyard Raspberry Chicken
recipeIngredient: 4 8 oz boneless skinless chicken breast halves
2 tbsp Dried tarragon leaves (or 4 tablespoons fresh)
recipeInstructions:
Spicy Raspberry Glaze: Combine all ingredients in a saucepan. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer for 15 minutes. Cool the mixture and hold until ready to use.
Maple-Raspberry Dressing: Whisk together the ingredients in a bowl (see below).
Prepare the Maple-raspberry dressing and pour it evenly over the chicken breasts. Marinate the chicken for 2 hours.
Grill the marinated chicken breasts. After turning once, brush each breast with about 1 ounce of the spicy raspberry glaze. Continue cooking until the chicken is done. Place on a plate and brush each breast with an additional 1 ounce of the spicy glaze. Top each serving with about 1 teaspoon of toasted pine nuts.
Raspberry Vinegar: Combine white vinegar, red vinegar, and half a cup of raspberries in a bowl. Cover and let sit for 48 hours. Strain the mixture and store at room temperature.
